meaning: n.吸引,吸引力,吸引人的事物
examples: The main attraction at Giverny is Monet's garden.
Part of the attraction of photography is gadgets and mechanical doodads.
She is the star attraction of the show.
The town of Boonville, in a kind of touristic jujitsu, turned isolation into an attraction in itself.
Grubb, who started chasing storms in 1974, acknowledged the thrill was part of the attraction.
